stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Deviation can either have a P (Plus) or M (Minus) Sign (S). If Number (N) is the number of degrees, and Direction (D) indicates whether the deviation is E (East) or W (West), fill in the following statement.

The pilot wishes to fly on a magnetic heading of 304°. The compass heading should be determined with a deviation value of (N) _____ and a designator of either (S) _____ or (D) _____.
